---
title: "Used Car Price Analysis"
author: "sayana"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

This project analyzes used car sales data to understand pricing trends and build a price prediction model.

# Dataset

The dataset contains information about used cars including:

- brand
- model
- year
- mileage
- selling price

# Data Cleaning

Missing values were removed and data types were converted.

```{r}
summary(car_data)
